name: Jackson Acquisition Co II
summary: PART I Overview. We are a blank check exempted company incorporated in the Cayman Islands on September 11, 2024, for the purpose of entering into a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, recapitalization, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses or entities.
